# .NET / ASP.NET CI/CD Agent

Overview:
This agent contains the definition files and prompt templates to assist platform engineers in generating CI/CD and related assets for .NET / ASP.NET Core applications.

Contents:
- manifest.yaml
- copilot-instructions.md
- prompts/

Usage:
- Open prompts/*.md to request specific artifact generation in Execution mode.
- This directory intentionally contains only agent definition assets. No CI/CD workflows, Dockerfiles, Terraform, Kubernetes, Helm, or security configs are included here.
